reviews.review_title: Staff bad and not worth playing
reviews.review_description:
I just downloaded the game and changed my name and starred playing having fun when a guy joins and I greet him with hi 👋 and ran off from the lava monkey but then he goes to leaderboard and insta bans me for no reason for 48 hours and it says no reason so they ban people for fun and does not un ban anyone 

DONT DOWLOAD!!!

-Brian Vr

reviews.review_title: I dont like co owners but love the game
reviews.review_description:
so i bout the game and it was fun me and my cousin playing minigames with nobody so then he gets off the vr so i go in a public lobby then see a guy with the stick and co owner 
Above him, so then I randomly say Man restart tag is better than this. Then the co-owner says shut up and I say you’re not my mother you can’t tell me to shut up and I’m just sticking up for myself so then he says who said that I’m a ban you and I say, Bendy I don’t care. I’m just sticking up for myself and then another guy. I forgot what he calls himself. He said that’s Hella respect you can’t ban him for that so then I say thank you and then leave and then I end up getting it to only private codes by myself when I join publics  so I keep joining back to back to back and then I get into the same code as the same co-owner says press option and I say no you’re not my mother you cannot tell me what to do then I keep encountering the same type of people but not co- owners so please give me more. I’m tired of this. ￼ respect to the guy who stood up for me ￼
I hate how say whatever something
Game is skidded, moderators are bad and i got false banned for my name (my name was: Gamer)
This game is the best I have mod stick in it
staff are nice and help with the game well and it’s fun and amazing to play

reviews.review_title: it’s really good i like this game!
reviews.review_description: i like the game it’s really fun
